nasb.text: The Spirit of the Lord will rest on Him, The spirit of wisdom and understanding, The spirit of counsel and strength, The spirit of knowledge and the fear of the Lord.

esv.text: And the Spirit of the Lord shall rest upon him, the Spirit of wisdom and understanding, the Spirit of counsel and might, the Spirit of knowledge and the fear of the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華的靈必停留在他身上， 就是智慧的靈和聰明的靈， 謀略的靈和能力的靈， 知識的靈和敬畏耶和華的靈。

ccb.text: 耶和华的灵必住在他身上， 使他有聪明和智慧、谋略和能力， 能认识并敬畏耶和华。

csbs.text: 耶和华的灵必停留在那一位身上， 就是智慧和悟性的灵， 谋略和大能的灵， 知识和敬畏耶和华的灵。
